description_long: This is a weathered, cylindrical metal barrel with a rusty, distressed surface and a faded red and white color scheme. The upper and lower thirds of the barrel are predominantly red, while the middle section is white, heavily stained with rust and grime. A prominent diamond-shaped hazard label with a flame icon and the word 'FLAMMABLE' is visible on one side, indicating it is used for storing or transporting hazardous materials. The surface is rough and corroded, with patches of rust and paint chipping throughout, suggesting prolonged outdoor exposure. The top is sealed, showing some minor dents and discoloration, and there are no visible handles or openings. This type of barrel is commonly found in industrial or urban environments, often used for storage or waste containment.
description: A rusty, red-and-white metal barrel with a flammable warning label and heavy weathering. The surface is corroded and stained, typical of industrial or urban storage containers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flammable warning label and the most prominent rust and paint wear.
description_view_1: Side view with no visible label, highlighting extensive rust and discoloration on the white band.
description_view_2: Rear view with a continuous red and white color scheme, showing uniform rust and weathering.
description_view_3: Angled view partially revealing the edge of the warning label and more subtle rust patterns.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top, middle, and bottom
attribute_labeling_or_markings: flammable warning label with flame icon and text
